title: Payment Entry App with Dynamic Form and Excel Export

requirements.summary: Create payment entry form with Customer Invoice Number and Payment Mode dropdown
acceptanceCriteria: Invoice Number field accepts text input and is marked as required
Payment Mode dropdown displays exactly two options: NEFT and Cheque
Both fields are always visible on the form

file_operations.description: Create payment entry form component with Invoice Number text input (required) and Payment Mode dropdown (required, options: NEFT, Cheque). Use shadcn-ui Input and Select components for consistent styling. Implement form state management using React hooks.

requirements.summary: Dynamically show NEFT-specific fields when Payment Mode is NEFT
acceptanceCriteria: NEFT fields appear only when NEFT is selected
All three NEFT fields are marked as required
Cheque fields are hidden when NEFT mode is active
Fields update immediately when Payment Mode changes

file_operations.description: Add conditional rendering logic to show Transaction ID/UTR Number (required text), Amount (required number), and Date of Payment (required date) fields when paymentMode state equals 'NEFT'. Use shadcn-ui Input components for text/number fields and implement date picker. Hide Cheque fields when NEFT is active.

requirements.summary: Dynamically show Cheque-specific fields when Payment Mode is Cheque
acceptanceCriteria: Cheque fields appear only when Cheque is selected
All four Cheque fields are marked as required
NEFT fields are hidden when Cheque mode is active
Fields update immediately when Payment Mode changes

file_operations.description: Add conditional rendering logic to show Bank Name (required text), Cheque Number (required text), Cheque Amount (required number), and Cheque Date (required date) fields when paymentMode state equals 'Cheque'. Use shadcn-ui Input components and implement date picker. Hide NEFT fields when Cheque is active.

requirements.summary: Submit payment entry to backend and clear form fields on success
acceptanceCriteria: Submit saves complete payment record to backend
Form clears immediately after successful save
Invoice Number resets to empty
Payment Mode resets to default/unselected state
All conditional fields clear and hide appropriately

file_operations.description: Implement form submission handler that calls backend submitPayment method with all form values. Convert Invoice Number to bigint. Pass null for fields not applicable to selected payment mode. On successful submission, reset all form state to default values (empty strings, null payment mode). Add error handling and loading states using shadcn-ui Button component.

Create custom hook for payment submission logic. Handle backend API call to submitPayment with proper type conversions (string to bigint for amounts, null handling for optional fields). Return submission status, loading state, and error state. Use core-infrastructure backend connection.

requirements.summary: Display all saved payment records in a table with all payment fields
acceptanceCriteria: Table displays all saved payment entries
All nine columns are visible in the table
Empty cells display for fields not applicable to payment mode
Table updates when new entries are submitted

file_operations.description: Create payment report table component that displays all payment records with columns: Invoice Number, Payment Mode, Transaction ID/UTR, NEFT Amount, NEFT Date, Bank Name, Cheque Number, Cheque Amount, Cheque Date. Use shadcn-ui Table components for consistent styling. Fetch payments using getAllPayments backend method. Display empty cells for null/undefined values. Convert bigint amounts to display format.

Create custom hook to fetch and manage payment records from backend. Call getAllPayments method and maintain records in state. Provide refresh function to reload data after new submissions. Handle loading and error states. Use core-infrastructure backend connection.

requirements.summary: Export all payment records to Excel file with Download Excel button
acceptanceCriteria: Download Excel button is visible in Report section
Clicking button generates and downloads Excel file
Excel file contains all nine specified columns
Excel includes all saved payment records
Empty cells for fields not applicable to payment mode

file_operations.description: Add Download Excel button above the table using shadcn-ui Button component. Implement Excel export functionality using a lightweight Excel library (xlsx or similar). Export all payment records with columns: Invoice Number, Payment Mode, Transaction ID/UTR, NEFT Amount, NEFT Date, Bank Name, Cheque Number, Cheque Amount, Cheque Date. Handle null values as empty cells. Convert bigint amounts to numbers for Excel.

Create utility function to export payment data to Excel format. Accept array of Payment records and generate Excel file with proper column headers and data formatting. Handle type conversions (bigint to number) and null values. Return downloadable blob.

requirements.summary: Implement mobile-first responsive layout with clean white and light grey theme
acceptanceCriteria: Layout is fully responsive and mobile-optimized
Color scheme uses white and light grey
Input fields are large enough for easy mobile typing
No animations or transitions
Page loads quickly with minimal resources
UI is clean and uncluttered

file_operations.description: Configure mobile-first responsive design with white and light grey color scheme. Set large input field sizes optimized for touch (min-height: 48px). Remove all animations and transitions. Use lightweight font stack. Apply clean, minimal styling with proper spacing for mobile devices.
Configure Tailwind theme with white and light grey colors. Set mobile-first breakpoints. Disable animation utilities. Configure large touch-friendly sizing defaults. Optimize for minimal CSS output.

Create main application layout with PaymentEntryForm and PaymentReportTable components. Apply mobile-first responsive container layout with white background and light grey section dividers. Ensure clean, uncluttered structure with proper spacing. No animations or transitions.
